sections.instruction: Complete the summary below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content:
High achievers
Although it is thought that people who bring work home every night would be top achievers, they tend to peak early and then go into (21) {{BLANK}} High achievers work hard, but within (22) {{BLANK}} It is also important to choose (23) {{BLANK}} you enjoy. Top achievers spend over (24) {{BLANK}} of their working hours doing work they prefer. They want (25) {{BLANK}} not just external rewards.
Top achievers take risks
options: A without worrying about the consequences
B only if they are assured of success
C even if they face possible failure

questions.content: Very often perfectionists
options: A turn out to be top achievers

questions.content: When top achievers make mistakes
options: B they get angry with themselves
C they learn from the experience

questions.content: Top achievers tend to be people who
Loners
options: A want to do everything themselves
B are free of the compulsion to be perfect
C take no notice of rivals
